channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Former top aide to New York City's mayor pleads not guilty in bribery case
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The New York City mayor's former chief adviser, her son and two real estate investors were indicted on Thursday on bribery and conspiracy charges, a case that comes as the mayor himself fights a separate corruption case and a series of criminal investigations roils City Hall.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ and JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Blinken announces aid for Sudan and talks about AI risks at UN Security Council
item.description: UNITED NATIONS (AP) — Secretary of State Antony Blinken announced $200 million in humanitarian aid for conflict-torn Sudan during what was likely his final trip to the United Nations while in office. With the U.N. Security Council more divided than ever, Blinken led two meetings of the U.N.
item.dc:creator: EDITH M. LEDERER and MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: James Gunn's 'Superman' trailer teases DC characters rarely seen in live-action movies
item.description: The trailer — which debuted one day after another, much shorter teaser — was posted to the film's social media pages and the DC Comics YouTube page at 9 a.m. Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, NewsNation

item.title: Israel and Hamas appear close to a ceasefire deal. These are the sticking points
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — Israel and Hamas appear closer than they have been in months to agreeing to a ceasefire that could wind down the 14-month war in Gaza and bring home dozens of people held hostage there. But the sides have come close before, only to have talks collapse over various disagreements.
item.dc:creator: SAMY MAGDY and TIA GOLDENBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Farmers, business owners, homeowners face uncertainty after $100B in disaster relief flounders
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — American farmers and small business owners are among those who will suffer if Congress cannot agree on a new spending bill after President-elect Donald Trump abruptly rejected a bipartisan plan that included more than $100 billion in disaster aid.
item.dc:creator: TRAVIS LOLLER and LEAH WILLINGHAM, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Fox News ‘Antisemitism Exposed’ Newsletter: Grim new term coined to describe Oct. 7 phenomenon
item.description: Fox News' "Antisemitism Exposed" newsletter brings you stories on the rising anti-Jewish prejudice across the U.S. and the world.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Illinois man fixes bikes for the less fortunate
item.description: "Growing up as a kid, I never had a new bike, but I did have a bike," said Chuck's Bikes and Blessings owner Chuck Henderson.
item.dc:creator: Tyler Hill, NewsNation

item.title: The Great Detachment: Why employees are increasingly dissatisfied with their jobs
item.description: (KRON) -- From the "Great Resignation" to the "Great Detachment?" That's where we are now, according to a new survey. Across the country, employees are feeling stuck and "increasingly detached from their jobs," according to the survey from Gallup, which came out earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Idaho prosecutors reject Bryan Kohberger's many attacks on search warrants
item.description: Idaho prosecutors have rejected a flurry of Bryan Kohberger's motions to attack search warrants in his arrest in the slaying of four university students.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mystery drone sightings continue in New Jersey and across the US. Here's what we know
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — A large number of mysterious drones have been reported flying over New Jersey and across the eastern U.S., sparking speculation and concern over where they came from and why.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Florida pursues charge against suspect in Trump assassination attempt for a crash after his arrest
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Florida authorities announced Wednesday that they're pursuing a criminal case against a man accused of trying to assassinate President-elect Donald Trump for a car crash that occurred after law enforcement stopped traffic to catch him.
item.dc:creator: KATE PAYNE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: New charges target ex-Miami congressman for lobbying on behalf of sanctioned Venezuelan tycoon
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — A federal grand jury in Washington has returned an indictment against former Congressman David Rivera for failing to register as a foreign agent of a sanctioned Venezuelan media tycoon on whose behalf the Miami Republican allegedly lobbied the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: JOSHUA GOODMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Pentagon transfers out 3 Guantanamo Bay detainees
item.description: Three Guantanamo Bay detainees were transferred out of Cuba this week to Malaysia and Kenya, the Pentagon announced, leaving 27 remaining at the facility.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Charlotte Hornets apologize after PS5 taken from 13-year-old during on-court giveaway
item.description: What was supposed to be a festive "skit" during the Charlotte Hornets game against the Philadelphia 76ers on Monday ended up earning the Hornets ‘Grinch’-like jeers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Ciara Lankford, KRON4

item.title: Former New Orleans priest, 93, is sentenced to life in prison for raping boy decades ago
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — A judge sentenced a 93-year-old former Catholic priest Wednesday to spend the rest of his life behind bars for raping a teenage boy decades ago.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Royal Caribbean passenger dies soon after being detained for chaotic incident caught on video
item.description: A Royal Caribbean cruise ship passenger was recently caught on camera acting unruly before being taken down by security. He died an hour later.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden DOJ opposes court decision allowing Derek Chauvin chance to examine George Floyd's heart
item.description: The Justice Department is asking a federal judge to reverse a defense legal victory in former Minneapolis police officer Derek Chauvin's appeal in his civil rights case over the death of George Floyd.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Young Americans richer than ever, sense ‘economic fragility’: Report
item.description: While wealth has increased, so has debt. Since 1989, student loan debt grew “nine-fold” due to more people attending college and tuition rates skyrocketing.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KRON4

item.title: Louisiana patient has first severe bird flu case in US: health officials
item.description: Human cases of bird flu have been reported in the U.S. before, but infections were mild in those patients.
item.dc:creator: Trinity Velazquez, KRON4

item.title: This Colorado restaurant only has 2 items on the menu
item.description: A Michelin-starred chef co-opened a restaurant in Denver with only two items on the menu: a burger and fries.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, ABC 4

item.title: Scientists find 'forever chemicals' lurking in certain smartwatch wristbands
item.description: Prior research has shown that more than a fifth of Americans wear a smartwatch or a fitness tracker — and they do so for extended periods of time.
item.dc:creator: Sharon Udasin, KRON4

item.title: Trump names Herschel Walker as ambassador to Bahamas
item.description: Trump had quipped before Election Day that he would put Walker in charge of a new missile defense shield if elected.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: 1 dead, 9 injured in Maryland shooting and fiery car crash: police
item.description: One person has died and nine others were injured following a shooting and related fiery car crash in Maryland on Tuesday, police said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, WGN 9

item.title: Trump names former football star as ambassador to Bahamas
item.description: (The Hill) - President-elect Trump said Tuesday he would nominate former NFL player and one-time Georgia Senate candidate Herschel Walker to serve as his ambassador to the Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KTLA 5

item.title: Democracies across the globe are at a crossroads, as authoritarians seek to chip away at freedoms
item.description: In November, the world's most powerful democracy elected as its next president a man who schemed to overturn its last presidential election. A month later, South Koreans swarmed their legislature to block their president's attempt to impose martial law.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: NASA's 2 stuck astronauts face more time in space with return delayed until at least late March
item.description: CAPE CANAVERAL, Fla. (AP) — NASA's two stuck astronauts just got their space mission extended again. That means they won't be back until spring, 10 months after rocketing into orbit on Boeing's Starliner capsule.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN AP Aerospace Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Indiana law shrouds executions in secrecy, prompting new pushes for public oversight
item.description: From public hangings in the town square to lethal injections witnessed by journalists, executions historically have mostly been carried out with at least some public scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA BOONE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Community members wrestle with grief in aftermath of Wisconsin school shooting
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Community members in Wisconsin continued to wrestle with grief and called for change in the aftermath of a school shooting that killed a teacher and a student and wounded six others.
item.dc:creator: DEVI SHASTRI and SCOTT BAUER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man, 23, pleads guilty to operating $100M illegal narcotics bazaar on dark web
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) - A 23-year-old man from Taiwan pleaded guilty this week to selling more than $100 million in illegal narcotics from a darknet website known as “Incognito Market,” the U.S. Department of Justice announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KTLA 5

item.title: 1 dead, 9 injured in Maryland shooting and fiery car crash: police
item.description: One person has died and nine others were injured following a shooting and related fiery car crash in Maryland on Tuesday, police said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, KRON4

item.title: After investigating Jan. 6, House GOP sides with Trump and goes after Liz Cheney
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Wrapping up their own investigation on the Jan. 6 2021 Capitol attack, House Republicans have concluded it's former GOP Rep.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Grubhub to pay $25M to settle claims of tricking customers and drivers
item.description: Federal Trade Commission officials said Grubhub engaged in illegal practices by misleading customers about the cost of delivery and the benefits of a Grubhub subscription.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Attack on 2 apparent Venezuelan migrants in Denver area seems gang-related, police chief says
item.description: DENVER (AP) — More than a dozen people tied up, pistol whipped and terrorized a man and woman at a crime-riddled apartment complex in a Denver suburb, the city’s police chief said Tuesday, adding it appeared to be a gang-related attack on two Venezuelan immigrants.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN SLEVIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tax brackets and more are changing in 2024, 2025: What to know
item.description: We’re still two weeks away from the end of 2024, but maybe you’re already gearing up for tax season (we are more than 100 days out from Tax Day, in case you’re curious).
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KTLA 5

item.title: Why shooting down mystery drones carries big risks
item.description: The buzz around the mysterious flurry of drones above New Jersey and other nearby states has prompted some officials, including President-elect Trump, to call for the U.S. military to shoot down the mystery objects. But such measures come with major risks, experts say.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, WGN 9

item.title: Tom Cruise awarded highest Navy honor for a civilian
item.description: The 62-year-old actor was celebrated for his outstanding contributions to the Navy and the Marine Corps.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KRON4

item.title: Viral study on black kitchen utensils had glaring error, researchers issue correction
item.description: If you were caught up in last month's panic over black kitchen cooking utensils, you now have a reason to breathe easier.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5
